name: Roasted Tomato and Mint Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a skillet over high heat.
2. Roast the tomatoes until soft and blackened on all sides, stirring frequently.
3. Process the roasted tomatoes with minced garlic until roughly chopped.
4. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (cilantro, mint, lime zest, lemon zest, and salt) and mix well.
6. Let the salsa stand for 30 minutes to allow the flavors to blend.
7. Serve with tortilla chips.
Variation: Add some chopped avocado before serving.
